fields.summary: Applies the paint's path effects and stroke settings to the source path, writing the resulting fill path to the destination builder.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst);

params.matrix: A matrix to apply to the resulting path.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the resulting path is non-empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Applies the paint's path effects and stroke settings to the source path within a cull rectangle, writing the resulting fill path to the destination builder.

params.resScale: The resolution scale to apply. Larger values produce more precise results.
